full_text:
Gao Wan (Bozhen)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Wan, styledBozhen, was born in Jiangyuan. Widely learned but plain and simple, he studied under Du Qiong. Gao Wan was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
